title: EVACUATION INFORMATION - 211info
text: NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES LINN COUNTY EVACUATION INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on emergencies occurring within the county. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Evacuation Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
